titleStmt.title: SII 10.249: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 249. (A.R. No. 554 of 1925.) ON A PILLAR IN THE OUTER MAṆḌAPA OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALINGĒŚVARA VĒLPŪRU, SATTENEPALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1131.

summary.p: States that Kasadi Sūramadēvi concubine of Kōṭa Kētarāja, gave 55 inupayeḍlu for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Rāmēśvara of Vēlpunūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakasamamulu mahiguṇavṛṣa
dhvajasaṁkhyagaṁ jaitrakṛṣṇapakṣakatidhiṁ ja
ṁdrajāhanajasaṁkramaṇaṁbuna vēlpunū
riṟēniki vararāmanādhunaku nemmiṁ bradīpa
mu gētavallabhōtsukamatiṁ beṭṭeṁ dāṁ gasa
dinuramadēvu lakhaṁḍḍa munnatini . 1
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kōṭakētarājulu bhō
gastrī kasadisūramadēvulu śakava¨rṣaṁbulu
1131ṇḍagu nēṁṭṭi caitraba 2 budhavā
ramuna viṣuvusaṁkrāṁtiyaṁdu dama talli
yamarasāniki dha¨rmmātthamugā vēlpu
nūri śrīrāmēśvaramahādēvara kācaṁdrā¨rkka
makhaṁḍava¨rttidīpamunaku niccina InpaEḍlu
55 vīniṁ jēkoni vilukaprōlebōyini koḍu
ku dēvanabōyuṁḍu tana putrānupautrikamu
nitya māneṁḍu neyi vōyaṁ galavāṁḍu
sōyaṁ dīpa makhaṁḍḍa magriyavibhavassā[¨r]vva
ya sa¨rvvātmanē pradādabhyudayāya sajja
nanutō rāmēśvarāyādarāttuṁ .
Digital edition of SII 10.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
